topStories.title: Ex-CIA Chief Says 1967 Law To Remove Presidents Formed For "Unhinged" Trump
topStories.description: The 25th Amendment to the US Constitution, which John Brennan invoked, deals with presidential succession and disability.

topStories.title: US media trapped between oligarchy and presidency
topStories.description: American billionaires are gobbling up more and more media outlets.

topStories.title: SNL cold open spoofs Melania Trump over Jeffrey Epstein remarks
topStories.description: Saturday Night Live has stirred controversy with a sketch mocking Melania Trump’s Epstein denial, turning her detailed statement into satire and triggering mixed reactions over comedy’s limits.

topStories.title: Putin steps in after US-Iran talks fail — Offers to broker peace in call with Iran president: Report cites Kremlin
topStories.description: The failure of the high-level talks underscores the widening divide between Washington and Tehran, with nuclear policy continuing to dominate negotiations.

topStories.title: Trump's Strait of Hormuz blockade threat raises risks and leaves predicaments unchanged
topStories.description: The conflict is now a test of wills - Iran’s capacity to absorb strikes versus Trump’s tolerance for the war's costs.

topStories.title: Trump warns China with 50% tariffs after reports suggest Beijing is preparing to send weapons to Iran
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump on Sunday threatened to impose a 50% tariff on China if it supplies weapons to Iran. Doubling down on his threat, Trump noted that any country that will supply weapons to Tehran, will face an immediate 50% tariff

topStories.title: Turkish President Erdogan calls Netanyahu ‘Hitler’, blinded by ‘blood, hatred’; threatens to invade Israel
topStories.description: Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan slammed Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and threatened to invade Israel. The development comes as high-stakes talks between the US and Iran in Islamabad failed to reach an agreement.

topStories.title: Iranian authorities remain defiant, urge supporters to stay in streets
topStories.description: Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, who led Iran's delegation in talks to end the war, said US delegation 'failed to gain trust'.

topStories.title: 'Civilisation Will Die' Remarks Brought Iran To Bargaining Table: Trump
topStories.description: "Let me tell you, that statement got them to the bargaining table, and they have it left. They have left the bargaining table. I predict they come back and they give us everything we want," Trump told...

dailyNews.title: Who was Danhao Wang? Chinese scholar at University of Michigan who reportedly died after 'hostile' questioning by US

dailyNews.title: Trump calls Asim Munir, Shehbaz Sharif ‘extraordinary men’ for hosting US-Iran talks; says they ‘continuously thank me’

dailyNews.title: US weather alert today: Storm warning for California as Sierra Nevada faces heavy snow, strong winds
dailyNews.description: The National Weather Service has issued a winter storm warning for parts of central California, cautioning that snow accumulations could reach up to 14 inches in some areas, accompanied by wind gusts of up to 45 mph.

dailyNews.title: Trump says US to blockade ships crossing Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump says the US Navy will immediately blockade the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump orders Hormuz blockade, warns Iran over nuclear standoff
dailyNews.description: In a post on Truth Social, Trump said: “Effective immediately, the United States Navy… will begin the process of BLOCKADING any and all Ships trying to enter, or leave, the Strait of Hormuz.” He added that the move aims to counter what he described as “world extortion” by Iran.

dailyNews.title: Ivanka Trump reveals surprising new living arrangement with her grandmother in Florida: It's a 'privilege'
dailyNews.description: Ivanka Trump calls her late mother, Ivana Trump, an incredible trailblazer and points to her maternal grandmother, Marie Zelníčková, as a model of outstanding nurturing.

dailyNews.title: Trump details sweeping 'all or nothing' blockade of Strait of Hormuz after failed Iran talks
dailyNews.description: In a Maria Bartiromo exclusive, Trump vows to choke off Iran's oil profits with a sweeping U.S. Navy blockade of the Strait of Hormuz region.

dailyNews.title: Trump orders a blockade in the Strait of Hormuz as tensions with Iran soar
dailyNews.description: Trump says the U.S. Navy will blockade the Strait of Hormuz and interdict vessels that paid tolls to Iran following a stalemate in peace talks.

dailyNews.title: After 16 years in power, Putin's closest friend in Europe faces a pivotal election
dailyNews.description: Few leaders have done more than Hungary’s Viktor Orbán to shape the global right-wing populism that informed President Donald Trump’s MAGA project.

dailyNews.title: What Now? Vance Leaves Iran Talks Without a Deal.
dailyNews.description: The lack of a breakthrough after 21 hours of negotiations leaves the Trump administration facing several unpalatable options.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s War With Iran Has Weakened America
dailyNews.description: The president should at long last recognize the ineptitude of his impulsive, go-it-alone approach.

dailyNews.title: Trump Fires Board That Oversees Presidio in San Francisco
dailyNews.description: All six board members that oversee the national historic landmark were terminated, part of the administration’s efforts to reshape the federal bureaucracy.

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. to blockade ships in Strait of Hormuz after failed peace talks
dailyNews.description: Vice President JD Vance told reporters that "we have not reached an agreement" following face-to-face talks with Iranian leaders and Pakistani negotiators.
